description: Autonomous memory consolidation via distillation + dreaming

tools.name: dream_generate
tools.description: Run the full dreaming pipeline (distill + dream) to consolidate memories into a structured Map. Runs automatically every hour, but can be triggered manually. Returns a summary of the generated map including cluster count, bridge count, and delta stats.

force.description: Force regeneration even if map is fresh (default: false)

tools.name: dream_status
tools.description: Check the current state of the dreaming system: last run time, map freshness, memory count, distillate cache status, and next scheduled run.

tools.name: dream_inject
tools.description: Get the current dream map formatted for injection into a system prompt. Returns the map JSON with recall directive. Used internally by the server on session init.

format.description: Output format: 'json' (raw map) or 'prompt' (formatted for system prompt injection). Default: 'prompt'.
